	- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (ShibaKimono.sol#779)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ShibaKimono._transfer(address,address,uint256) (ShibaKimono.sol#641-743):
	External calls:
	- swapTokensForEth(contractTokenBalance) (ShibaKimono.sol#715)
		- uniswapV2Router.swapExactTokensForETHSupportingFeeOnTransferTokens(tokenAmount,0,path,address(this),block.timestamp) (ShibaKimono.sol#757-769)
	External calls sending eth:
	- sendETHToFee(address(this).balance) (ShibaKimono.sol#721)
		- _teamAddress.transfer(amount.mul(4).div(10)) (ShibaKimono.sol#777)
		- _marketingFunds.transfer(amount.mul(6).div(10)) (ShibaKimono.sol#779)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ShibaKimono.sol#741)
		- _rOwned[address(this)] = _rOwned[address(this)].add(rTeam) (ShibaKimono.sol#949)
		- _rOwned[sender] = _rOwned[sender].sub(rAmount) (ShibaKimono.sol#929)
		- _rOwned[recipient] = _rOwned[recipient].add(rTransferAmount) (ShibaKimono.sol#931)
	ShibaKimono._rOwned (ShibaKimono.sol#351) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ShibaKimono._takeTeam(uint256) (ShibaKimono.sol#943-951)
	- ShibaKimono._transferStandard(address,address,uint256) (ShibaKimono.sol#903-939)
	- ShibaKimono.balanceOf(address) (ShibaKimono.sol#467-471)
	- ShibaKimono.constructor(address,address) (ShibaKimono.sol#413-431)
	- _tokenTransfer(from,to,amount,takeFee) (ShibaKimono.sol#741)
		- _rTotal = _rTotal.sub(rFee) (ShibaKimono.sol#957)
	ShibaKimono._rTotal (ShibaKimono.sol#363) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ShibaKimono._getCurrentSupply() (ShibaKimono.sol#1099-1109)
	- ShibaKimono._reflectFee(uint256,uint256) (ShibaKimono.sol#955-961)
	- ShibaKimono.constructor(address,address) (ShibaKimono.sol#413-431)
	- ShibaKimono.tokenFromReflection(uint256) (ShibaKimono.sol#571-593)

detectors.description:
Reentrancy in ShibaKimono.openTrading() (ShibaKimono.sol#785-833):
	External calls:
	- uniswapV2Pair = IUniswapV2Factory(_uniswapV2Router.factory()).createPair(address(this),_uniswapV2Router.WETH()) (ShibaKimono.sol#797-799)
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ShibaKimono.sol#801-815)
	External calls sending eth:
	- uniswapV2Router.addLiquidityETH{value: address(this).balance}(address(this),balanceOf(address(this)),0,0,owner(),block.timestamp) (ShibaKimono.sol#801-815)
	State variables written after the call(s):
	- tradingOpen = true (ShibaKimono.sol#823)
	ShibaKimono.tradingOpen (ShibaKimono.sol#387) can be used in cross function reentrancies:
	- ShibaKimono.openTrading() (ShibaKimono.sol#785-833)
